resources.string:
Welcome to ClipShift!

 Your all-in-one downloader for most social media apps:
 ✅ YouTube
 ✅ Instagram
 ✅ Twitter (X)
 ... and many more!

 🚀 Simple Mode:
 Just copy the link (whether it's a video, reel, or story), paste it in, and hit Download. The app automatically delivers the best quality for you.

 🛠️ Expert Mode:
 Want full control? Manually choose between MP4 (video) and MP3 (audio). Decide on the resolution (e.g., 1080p) or the audio bitrate for your music yourself.

 📂 Storage Location:
 Your downloads land directly in the "Downloads/ClipShift" folder on your phone.
Download not possible without storage access!
